loop.player_action: Open the game and touch or click the closet
loop.system_response: Show the fixed doll, categories and immediately interactive wardrobe
loop.feedback: First equip is possible without a modal or tutorial

loop.player_action: Equip hair, main outfit, support pieces, shoes and a magic accent
loop.system_response: Update the doll immediately and emit short visual Essence hints
loop.feedback: The look remains beautiful and fully visible; selected states are explicit

loop.player_action: Fill the main-focus and accent-focus slots
loop.system_response: Resolve one deterministic unordered pair from Moon, Bloom and Flame
loop.feedback: AWAKEN becomes the single dominant action

loop.system_response: Play intro, charge, flash, unique pair reveal, audience response and victory
loop.feedback: The original outfit survives beneath distinct magical overlays and signature VFX

loop.system_response: Reveal the two focus-piece Essences, record the recipe and grant a cosmetic reward
loop.feedback: New recipe silhouette becomes a player-authored card in the album

loop.system_response: Preserve progress and offer a fast route to an unknown pair or a remix
loop.feedback: The next experiment begins without loading, waiting or punishment
